items.title: AI日报
items.mainLine: 今日筛出 6 条 AI 技术信号，优先看 「NVIDIA Nemotron Achieves Benchmark-Leading Performance With LangChain Deep Agents Harness」、「实测Claude Science,搞科研的人有福了」。脉络集中在大模型训练/推理、Agent Skill、Auto-Research/Harness 与可复制工程实践。

items.title: NVIDIA Nemotron Achieves Benchmark-Leading Performance With LangChain Deep Agents Harness
items.summary: 这篇内容聚焦「Agent Skill、Harness、工具调用和自动化研发」。原文摘要显示：NVIDIA Nemotron 3 Ultra is offering leading performance at lower cost than top closed models with the largest and most widely adopted AI agent orchestration platform. LangChain tuned its Deep Agents harness for NVIDIA N…
items.insightText: 重点看任务拆分、工具编排、验证闭环和可复用工程抽象，判断能否迁移到 Auto-Research / Agent Coding 链路。

items.title: Separating signal from noise in coding evaluations
items.summary: 这篇内容聚焦「大模型训练、推理、RAG、后训练或评测」。原文摘要显示：A new analysis from OpenAI reveals issues in SWE-Bench Pro, a popular coding benchmark, raising concerns about reliability and accuracy in evaluating AI models.
items.insightText: 先快速判断它是否包含可复用方法、架构或工程经验，再决定是否进入日报深读。

items.title: Helping K–12 educators build practical AI skills
items.summary: 这篇内容聚焦「Agent Skill、Harness、工具调用和自动化研发」。原文摘要显示：OpenAI Academy and the Walton Family Foundation are bringing hands-on AI Skills Jams to help K–12 educators build practical AI skills for the classroom.
items.insightText: 重点看任务拆分、工具编排、验证闭环和可复用工程抽象，判断能否迁移到 Auto-Research / Agent Coding 链路。

items.summary: 这篇内容聚焦「Agent Skill、Harness、工具调用和自动化研发」。原文摘要显示：Grok 4.5 is SpaceXAI's smartest model built for coding, agentic tasks, and knowledge work.

items.title: Three new satellites join the fight against wildfires.
items.summary: 这篇内容聚焦「AI 技术演进和可复用工程实践」。原文摘要显示：Three new FireSat satellites have launched, expanding a network that uses Google AI to help fire agencies detect early-stage wildfires.
items.insightText: 先快速判断它是否包含可复用方法、架构或工程经验，再决定是否进入日报深读。
